results.text: Processing shall be lawful only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies:
results.object: only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies:
results.condition: if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies

results.text: Processing shall be lawful only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies: (a) the data subject has given consent to the processing of his or her personal data for one or more specific purposes;
results.object: only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies: (a) the data subject has given consent to the processing of his or her personal data for one or more specific purposes;
results.condition: if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies

results.text: Processing shall be lawful only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies: (b) processing is necessary for the performance of a contract to which the data subject is party or in order to take steps at the request of the data subject prior to entering into a contract;
results.object: only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies: (b) processing is necessary for the performance of a contract to which the data subject is party or in order to take steps at the request of the data subject prior to entering into a contract;
results.condition: if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies

results.text: Processing shall be lawful only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies: (c) processing is necessary for compliance with a legal obligation to which the controller is subject;
results.object: only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies: (c) processing is necessary for compliance with a legal obligation to which the controller is subject;
results.condition: if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies

results.text: Processing shall be lawful only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies: (d) processing is necessary in order to protect the vital interests of the data subject or of another natural person;
results.object: only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies: (d) processing is necessary in order to protect the vital interests of the data subject or of another natural person;
results.condition: if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies

results.text: Processing shall be lawful only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies: (e) processing is necessary for the performance of a task carried out in the public interest or in the exercise of official authority vested in the controller;
results.object: only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies: (e) processing is necessary for the performance of a task carried out in the public interest or in the exercise of official authority vested in the controller;
results.condition: if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies

results.text: Processing shall be lawful only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies: (f) processing is necessary for the purposes of the legitimate interests pursued by the controller or by a third party, except where such interests are overridden by the interests or fundamental rights and freedoms of the data subject which require protection of personal data, in particular where the data subject is a child. Point (f) of the first subparagraph shall not apply to processing carried out by public authorities in the performance of their tasks.
results.actor: in particular where the data subject is a child. Point (f) of the first subparagraph
results.object: to processing carried out by public authorities in the performance of their tasks.
results.manner: by the controller or by a third party
results.condition: if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies

results.text: Member States may maintain introduce more specific provisions to adapt the application of the rules of this Regulation with regard to processing for compliance with points (c) and (e) of paragraph 1 by determining more precisely specific requirements for the processing and other measures to ensure lawful and fair processing including for other specific processing situations as provided for in Chapter IX.
results.object: introduce more specific provisions to adapt the application of the rules of this Regulation with regard to processing for compliance with points (c) and (e) of paragraph 1 by determining more precisely specific requirements for the processing and other measures to ensure lawful and fair processing including for other specific processing situations as provided for in Chapter IX.
results.temporal: by determining more precisely specific requirements
results.manner: by determining more precisely specific requirements for the processing and other measures to ensure lawful and fair processing including for other specific processing situations as provided for in Chapter IX
results.condition: for compliance with points (c) and (e) of paragraph 1

results.text: The basis for the processing referred to in point (c) and (e) of paragraph 1 shall be laid down by:
results.actor: The basis for the processing referred to in point (c) and (e) of paragraph 1
results.object: down by:
results.manner: by:

results.text: The basis for the processing referred to in point (c) and (e) of paragraph 1 shall be laid down by: (a) Union law; or
results.actor: The basis for the processing referred to in point (c) and (e) of paragraph 1
results.object: down by: (a) Union law; or
results.manner: by: (a) Union law

results.text: The basis for the processing referred to in point (c) and (e) of paragraph 1 shall be laid down by: (b) Member State law to which the controller is subject. The purpose of the processing shall be determined in that legal basis or, as regards the processing referred to in point (e) of paragraph 1, shall be necessary for the performance of a task carried out in the public interest or in the exercise of official authority vested in the controller. That legal basis may contain provisions to adapt the application of rules of this Regulation, inter alia: the general conditions governing the lawfulness of processing by the controller; the types of data which are subject to the processing; the data subjects concerned; the entities to, and the purposes for which, the personal data may be disclosed; the purpose limitation; storage periods; and processing operations and processing procedures, including measures to ensure lawful and fair processing such as those for other specific processing situations as provided for in Chapter IX. The Union or the Member State law shall meet an objective of public interest and be proportionate to the legitimate aim pursued.
results.actor: The basis for the processing referred to in point (c) and (e) of paragraph 1
results.object: down by: (b) Member State law to which the controller is subject. The purpose of the processing shall be determined in that legal basis or, as regards the processing referred to in point (e) of paragraph 1, shall be necessary for the performance of a task carried out in the public interest or in the exercise of official authority vested in the controller. That legal basis may contain provisions to adapt the application of rules of this Regulation, inter alia: the general conditions governing the lawfulness of processing by the controller; the types of data which are subject to the processing; the data subjects concerned; the entities to, and the purposes for which, the personal data may be disclosed; the purpose limitation; storage periods; and processing operations and processing procedures, including measures to ensure lawful and fair processing such as those for other specific processing situations as provided for in Chapter IX. The Union or the Member State law shall meet an objective of public interest and be proportionate to the legitimate aim pursued.
results.manner: by: (b) Member State law to which the controller is subject

results.text: The Controller SHALL take into account, inter alia: where the processing for a purpose other than that for which the personal data have been collected is not based on the data subject's consent or on a union or member state law which constitutes a necessary and proportionate measure in a democratic society to safeguard the objectives referred to in article 23(1).
results.object: into account, inter alia: where the processing for a purpose other than that for which the personal data have been collected is not based on the data subject's consent or on a union or member state law which constitutes a necessary and proportionate measure in a democratic society to safeguard the objectives referred to in article 23(1).

results.text: The Controller SHALL take into account, inter alia: (a) any link between the purposes for which the personal data have been collected and the purposes of the intended further processing, where the processing for a purpose other than that for which the personal data have been collected is not based on the data subject's consent or on a union or member state law which constitutes a necessary and proportionate measure in a democratic society to safeguard the objectives referred to in article 23(1).
results.object: into account, inter alia: (a) any link between the purposes for which the personal data have been collected and the purposes of the intended further processing, where the processing for a purpose other than that for which the personal data have been collected is not based on the data subject's consent or on a union or member state law which constitutes a necessary and proportionate measure in a democratic society to safeguard the objectives referred to in article 23(1).

results.text: The Controller SHALL take into account, inter alia: (b) the context in which the personal data have been collected, in particular regarding the relationship between data subjects and The Controller, where the processing for a purpose other than that for which the personal data have been collected is not based on the data subject's consent or on a union or member state law which constitutes a necessary and proportionate measure in a democratic society to safeguard the objectives referred to in article 23(1).
results.object: into account, inter alia: (b) the context in which the personal data have been collected, in particular regarding the relationship between data subjects and The Controller, where the processing for a purpose other than that for which the personal data have been collected is not based on the data subject's consent or on a union or member state law which constitutes a necessary and proportionate measure in a democratic society to safeguard the objectives referred to in article 23(1).

results.text: The Controller SHALL take into account, inter alia: (c) the nature of the personal data, in particular whether special categories of personal data are processed, pursuant to Article 9, or whether personal data related to criminal convictions and offences are processed, pursuant to Article 10, where the processing for a purpose other than that for which the personal data have been collected is not based on the data subject's consent or on a union or member state law which constitutes a necessary and proportionate measure in a democratic society to safeguard the objectives referred to in article 23(1).

results.text: The Controller SHALL take into account, inter alia: (d) the possible consequences of the intended further processing for data subjects, where the processing for a purpose other than that for which the personal data have been collected is not based on the data subject's consent or on a union or member state law which constitutes a necessary and proportionate measure in a democratic society to safeguard the objectives referred to in article 23(1).
results.object: into account, inter alia: (d) the possible consequences of the intended further processing for data subjects, where the processing for a purpose other than that for which the personal data have been collected is not based on the data subject's consent or on a union or member state law which constitutes a necessary and proportionate measure in a democratic society to safeguard the objectives referred to in article 23(1).

results.text: The controller or processor MAY provide appropriate safeguards referred to in paragraph 1, without requiring any specific authorisation from a supervisory authority, by: (f) an approved certification mechanism pursuant to Article 42 together with binding and enforceable commitments to apply the appropriate safeguards, including as regards data subjects' rights.
results.object: appropriate safeguards referred to in paragraph 1, without requiring any specific authorisation from a supervisory authority, by: (f) an approved certification mechanism pursuant to Article 42 together with binding and enforceable commitments to apply the appropriate safeguards, including as regards data subjects' rights.
results.manner: by: (f) an approved certification mechanism pursuant to Article 42 together with binding and enforceable commitments to apply the appropriate safeguards
results.condition: as regards data subjects' rights

results.text: Subject to the authorisation from the competent supervisory authority, the appropriate safeguards referred to in paragraph 1 may also be provided for, in particular, by:

results.object: be provided for, in particular, by:

results.text: Subject to the authorisation from the competent supervisory authority, the appropriate safeguards referred to in paragraph 1 may also be provided for, in particular, by: (a) contractual clauses between the controller or processor and the controller, processor or the recipient of the personal data in the third country or international organisation; or

results.condition: authorisation from the competent supervisory authority

results.text: Subject to the authorisation from the competent supervisory authority, the appropriate safeguards referred to in paragraph 1 may also be provided for, in particular, by: (b) provisions to be inserted into administrative arrangements between public authorities or bodies which include enforceable and effective data subject rights.

results.text: The supervisory authority shall apply the consistency mechanism referred to in Article 63 in the cases referred to in paragraph 3 of this Article.
results.object: the consistency mechanism referred to in Article 63 in the cases referred to in paragraph 3 of this Article.

results.text: Authorisations by a Member State or supervisory authority on the basis of Article 26(2) of Directive 95/46/EC shall remain until amended, replaced or repealed, if necessary, by that supervisory authority.
results.actor: Authorisations by a Member State or supervisory authority on the basis of Article 26(2) of Directive 95/46/EC

results.text: Decisions adopted by the Commission on the basis of Article 26(4) of Directive 95/46/EC shall remain in force until amended, replaced or repealed, if necessary, by a Commission Decision adopted in accordance with paragraph 2 of this Article.

results.text: The Board shall draw up an annual report regarding the protection of natural persons with regard to processing in the Union and, where relevant, in third countries and international organisations.
results.object: up an annual report regarding the protection of natural persons with regard to processing in the Union and, where relevant, in third countries and international organisations.
results.condition: where relevant

results.text: The report shall be made public and be transmitted to the European Parliament, to the Council and to the Commission.
results.object: public and be transmitted to the European Parliament, to the Council and to the Commission.
results.condition: to the European Parliament, to the Council and to the Commission

results.text: The annual report shall include a review of the practical application of the guidelines, recommendations and best practices referred to in point (l) of Article 70(1) as well as of the binding decisions referred to in Article 65.
results.object: a review of the practical application of the guidelines, recommendations and best practices referred to in point (l) of Article 70(1) as well as of the binding decisions referred to in Article 65.
